scripts.lint:js: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run check:svelte
scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run lint:js
scripts.format: npm run format:py && npm run format:js
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:py && npm run format:check:js
scripts.dev:stand:config: docker compose --env-file .env.remnawave-dev -f docker-compose-dev.yml -f docker-compose.remnawave-dev.yml --profile seed config --quiet
scripts.dev:stand:up: docker compose --env-file .env.remnawave-dev -f docker-compose-dev.yml -f docker-compose.remnawave-dev.yml --profile seed up -d --build postgres redis remnawave-db remnawave-redis remnawave remnawave-dev-seed remnawave-subscription-page migrate dev-seed backend frontend
scripts.dev:stand:down: docker compose --env-file .env.remnawave-dev -f docker-compose-dev.yml -f docker-compose.remnawave-dev.yml --profile seed down
scripts.dev:stand:ps: docker compose --env-file .env.remnawave-dev -f docker-compose-dev.yml -f docker-compose.remnawave-dev.yml --profile seed ps
scripts.dev:stand:logs: docker compose --env-file .env.remnawave-dev -f docker-compose-dev.yml -f docker-compose.remnawave-dev.yml --profile seed logs -f backend frontend remnawave remnawave-subscription-page
scripts.typecheck:py: python -m mypy --explicit-package-bases backend/config backend/db backend/bot/infra backend/bot/middlewares backend/bot/utils backend/bot/plugins backend/bot/keyboards backend/bot/payment_providers backend/bot/services backend/bot/handlers backend/bot/app/factories backend/bot/app/controllers backend/bot/app/web backend/main_backend.py backend/main_worker.py
scripts.check:backend: python scripts/check_architecture.py && npm test && npm run lint:py && npm run format:check:py && npm run typecheck:py
scripts.check:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run check && npm --prefix frontend run test && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm run check:e2e
scripts.check:quick: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build:webapp
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
